title: Protocol and firmware evidence pivots
purpose: Make Protocol and Firmware Labs more useful as evidence sources by improving pivots from fields/files to artifacts, strings, and findings.
actions: Add nested artifact summary for firmware file inspection
Add protocol field pivots to string hints and binary offsets
Improve status JSON for firmware/protocol commands

criteria: Existing Firmware and Protocol Lab tests continue to pass
Nested artifact links are safe when missing
Inspector rows can jump to related objects

summary: Added protocol field pivots, firmware nested artifact summaries, and richer status JSON pivots.
